subject: Pokemon Catcher — a Poke Ball or capture device in motion against a dynamic background
description: A large rounded capture device — appearing to be a Poke Ball or similar device — is shown at speed against a multi-colored streaking background. The device is rendered in clean blue and white tones, while the background features dynamic diagonal color streaks in yellow, green, red, and blue, suggesting rapid motion or a lure effect. The image is entirely object-focused with no trainer or Pokemon figure visible.
foreground: rounded capture device in blue and white
